LanguageData.SylvieRace_ScarHead.label: Sylvie Scar
LanguageData.SylvieRace_ScarHead.description: Scars left on the face from past experiences.
LanguageData.SylvieRace_ScarBody.label: Sylvie Body Scar
LanguageData.SylvieRace_ScarBody.description: Scars covering the body, telling stories of the past.
